data.narrative: Built a FastAPI monorepo app at apps/api with GET /health and pydantic PORT validation. Diagnosed BREAK/FIX as wrong working directory versus a broken endpoint; verified fail-fast when PORT is invalid.

dimension_scores.observation: Chose monorepo with clear scaling rationale.
dimension_scores.evidence: DECIDE B: workers, shared types, avoid major repo reorganization later.

dimension_scores.observation: Separated cwd confusion from app health; tested PORT=abc hypothesis.
dimension_scores.evidence: Hypothesis: root had no .env; apps/api PORT=abc caused validation startup failure.

dimension_scores.observation: Understood public redirect vs protected admin at VERIFY.
dimension_scores.evidence: Redirects public for link users; admin protected to prevent unauthorized data changes.

dimension_scores.observation: Connected env validation and cwd to production-style failures.
dimension_scores.evidence: Fail-fast on invalid PORT; documented pwd/apps/api habit before uvicorn.

dimension_scores.observation: Answers improved with structure; sometimes needed command scaffolding.
dimension_scores.evidence: Final BREAK hypothesis included pwd, PORT, and curl evidence.

strengths: Completed FastAPI health endpoint with reproducible curl proof.
Closed BREAK/FIX with evidence-driven cwd vs validation distinction.
growth_areas: Always confirm pwd under apps/api before server commands to avoid repeat wrong-directory errors.
data.recommendation: Before Module 02, run a one-line preflight: pwd, ls .env package.json, then start the server.

public_evidence.student_action: Implemented GET /health in FastAPI and verified with curl.
public_evidence.ability: Bootstraps a runnable API with an operability check
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Shows baseline service setup before database and auth work

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Built under apps/api per layout B

teaching_approaches.detail: Wrong cwd vs npm ENOENT pattern
